Welcome to

Send His Word Ministries

“Making Disciples of All Nations” - Matthew 28:19-20

A Christ-centered ministry committed to teaching the Word of God, raising disciples, strengthening families, and reaching the nations with the Gospel of Jesus Christ.

Watch Latest Sermon Request Prayer

Grow in the Word

Study the Bible and grow spiritually through discipleship, prayer and teaching.

Watch & Listen

Sermons, teachings, worship moments and live stream links for the ministry.

Our Ministries

Find your place to serve and grow through the ministry family.

Support the Ministry

Partner with us to reach more souls and strengthen discipleship work.

About Us

A Church Family Built on the Word, Prayer and Discipleship

Send His Word Ministries is a Christ-centered family of believers passionate about making disciples of all nations through the living Word of God.

Leadership

Lead Pastor

The Lead Pastor gives spiritual oversight to Send His Word Ministries, teaching the Word, strengthening families and raising disciples.

Open Pastor Photo

Ministries

Find Your Place to Grow and Serve

Discipleship Ministry

Raising and equipping disciples for Kingdom impact.

Married's Ministry

Strengthening marriages and building godly homes.

Youth Ministry

Empowering young people to know Christ and live with purpose.

Children's Ministry

Nurturing children in the Word, prayer, worship and love of God.

Healing Ministry

Prayer, counselling, teaching and testimonies through healing sessions.

Discipleship Ministry

Three Centres. One Mission.

Northern Discipleship School

Raises believers grounded in the Word, strengthened in prayer and equipped for community transformation across Northern Uganda.

Biblical foundationsPrayer formationCommunity witness
Open Northern Gallery
Class SessionsView photos in DrivePrayer and WorshipView photos in DriveFellowship MomentsView photos in Drive

Central Discipleship School

Equips disciples to serve faithfully in church, family and community through teaching, mentoring and ministry practice.

Word-based discipleshipLeadership growthPractical service
Open Central Gallery
Teaching SessionsView photos in DriveMinistry TrainingView photos in DriveStudent FellowshipView photos in Drive

Western Discipleship School

Focuses on spiritual maturity, servant leadership, evangelism and practical Christian living in the Western region.

Spiritual maturityFamily witnessEvangelism
